subcodes.title: Words spoken in late Aug./early Sept. 1911 in Vevey
subcodes.first_line: Christ and all the Prophets have taught in their Holy Books the immortality of the soul. Jesus during His life had so many afflictions
subcodes.subjects: @proofs for the existence; immortality of the soul, @the lower is unable to comprehend the higher, @purpose; goal of creation, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @existence; immortality of the human soul, @second birth, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence
